title: EETEPA Mission Control Classroom
notice: Educational project inspired by EETEPA Vilhena Alves. It is not an official institutional system and does not use real student data.

missions.title: Open The Briefing
missions.story: The class receives a technical incident and must organize teams before the first action.
missions.challenge: Create a team name, choose a role, and explain the first decision in one sentence.
missions.hint: Good teams define who reads, who tests, who writes, and who presents.
missions.deliverable: Team role card and first decision.

missions.title: Dispatch The Mission
missions.story: Mission control unlocks the main challenge and reveals constraints.
missions.challenge: Pick one mission card, identify the risk, and choose a safe action.
missions.hint: Read constraints before solving. Speed without interpretation costs points.

missions.title: Debrief And Score
missions.story: Teams compare evidence and convert technical choices into learning evidence.
missions.challenge: Present what worked, what failed, and what should be improved.
